word.name: concept header for the concept of class threads
word.title: Concept Header for the Concept of Class Threads

conceptHeader.description: A class thread is Tapestry's core structural pattern for a fully-normalized concept in the Neo4j graph. It is a directed path: ConceptHeader –[IS_THE_CONCEPT_FOR]→ Superset –[IS_A_SUPERSET_OF]→ (0 or more Supersets/Sets) –[HAS_ELEMENT]→ Elements. The thread has three phases: initiation (ConceptHeader → Superset), propagation (Superset → sub-Supersets or Sets, 0+ hops), and termination (Superset/Set → Element). Every concept must have at least one complete class thread to be considered fully normalized.
